_fill: YOU fill this. Non-negotiable rules the system must always enforce — not features, but invariants. Include why the rule exists.

businessRules.category: e.g. Booking | Payments | Access Control | Data Retention
businessRules.rule: State the rule clearly and unambiguously.
businessRules.rationale: Why does this rule exist? What bad outcome does it prevent?
businessRules.enforcement: How is this rule enforced technically? (e.g. DB constraint, service-layer validation, policy check)
exceptions: Any legitimate exceptions to this rule — or omit this field if none
